creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
And rejected, it contains "MAN1="

I have to believe you don't understand why "MAN<X>=" in staging PR is wrong.  I've pointed this out about 5 times and you keep doing it.  The only reasonable explanation is you don't know how to handle staging.

you aren't following this:
https://wiki.freebsd.org/ports/StageDir

I'm rejecting this PR because it's again untested and this is grossly wrong.
It didn't even contain the minimum of "make check-plist", "make stage-qa", portlint, and "make check-sanity" which I have requested numerous times.


These are REQUIREMENTS for your that I won't waive.
